product.name: Albion Art 1560 Straight Wheel Head Valve
product.description: This ART 1560 valve features a straight wheel head design and boasts an innovative auto-seal tail piece that ensures a secure fit. It's engineered to work seamlessly with all types of radiators, making it an incredibly versatile choice. Furthermore, this valve is offered in a range of sizes to fit various specifications, and a BSP to copper adaptor is available upon request.In terms of technical specifications, this valve can withstand a maximum pressure of 10 Bar and operate at a maximum temperature of 100°C. It is manufactured from nickel plated brass and features an ABS handle, a PTFE gasket and EPDM rubber gasket. For added convenience, this valve also comes available with a pre-setting option that simplifies installation and setup. Its screwed BSP parallel M/F threading, which complies with ISO 228/1 standards, ensures a tight and reliable connection.Features & Benefits: Albion Art 1560 Straight Wheel Head ValveBoasts an innovative auto-seal tail piece that ensures a secure fitEngineered to work seamlessly with all types of radiatorsFeatures an ABS handle, a PTFE gasket and EPDM rubber gasket

product.name: Albion Art 642 1 inch Gunmetal Safety Valve
product.description: This safety valve has a body made from gunmetal and features a screwed BSP parallel (ISO 228). Suitable for gases, liquids and steam, this safety valve is fitted with a diaphragm to protect the spring housing.With high capacity discharge, this safety valve is available in a range of set pressures from 3.0 Bar to 6.0 Bar. Typical applications for this WRAS-approved gunmetal safety valve include pressure vessels, mechanical engineering, pump protection, pressure booster systems water/air-side, cooling/chilling systems and stream and industrial boiler systems.Features & Benefits: Albion Art 642 1 inch Gunmetal Safety Valve ISO 4126-1, PED 2014/68/EU, TRD 421 Classification - GL, DNVATEX approval available at extra costWRAS approved (1/2 inch-1 1/4 inch) other sizes under approvalSet range 0.5 to 16 BarScrewed BSP parallel (ISO 228)Suitable for gases, liquids and steamFitted with Diaphragm to protect spring housingHigh capacity discharge24-month warranty

product.name: Stainless Steel 3 piece ball valve
product.description: The Stainless Steel 3-Piece Ball Valve is a durable and versatile valve designed for efficient flow control in a variety of applications. Made from high-quality stainless steel, this valve is built to withstand harsh environments, offering excellent resistance to corrosion and wear. Its 3-piece construction allows for easy maintenance and cleaning, ensuring long-lasting performance. Ideal for both commercial and industrial use, it features full port flow for maximum efficiency with minimal pressure drop.This ball valve is equipped with a secure locking mechanism for reliable sealing and operation, and its design allows for easy disassembly without removing the entire valve from the pipeline. Suitable for use in high-pressure systems, it provides precise control over the flow of liquids or gases.Features & Benefits: Stainless Steel 3 piece ball valveFull port design for maximum flow efficiency and minimal pressure dropDurable stainless steel construction offers excellent resistance to corrosion and wearVarious sizes available

product.name: Albion Art 198 DZR Brass Y Type Strainer M Press Fit Ends
product.description: The Albion Art 198 DZR Brass Y Type Strainer is designed for efficient filtration and reliable performance in plumbing and industrial systems. Crafted from dezincification-resistant (DZR) brass, this strainer ensures long-lasting durability, even in demanding environments. Its built-in stainless steel 304 strainer effectively removes debris, protecting your system components from blockages and wear. With pre-press leak detection and M-profile press fitting ends, installation is straightforward and hassle-free.This Y type strainer is compatible with both M and V profiles (15mm to 35mm) and dedicated M profiles (42mm and 54mm), making it suitable for a wide range of applications. With a maximum pressure of 20 bar and a working temperature range of -10°C to +150°C, this strainer is built to handle tough conditions with ease.Features & Benefits: Albion Art 198 DZR Brass Y Type Strainer M Press Fit Ends Durable DZR brass construction resists corrosionStainless steel 304 built-in strainer protects componentsBacked by a 5-year warrantyPlease note: CE approved
product.variant_name: Albion Art DZR Brass Y Type Strainer M Press Fit Ends - 28mm

product.name: Albion Art LFBK Press Fit DZR Black Handle Ball Valve
product.description: The Albion Art LFBK Press Fit DZR Black Handle Ball Valve is a high-quality, full-bore valve designed for efficient and secure flow control in a wide range of systems. CE and WRAS approved, this valve is built for reliability and safety, making it ideal for both residential and commercial applications. With its press-fit design and durable DZR brass construction, it ensures leak-free operation and long-lasting performance in demanding environments.This valve is pressure-rated up to 24 bar (DN15) and temperature-resistant from -20°C to +140°C, making it suitable for hot and cold water systems, as well as other applications. product.name: Rockwool Rocklap 20mm Wall x 1m Foil Faced Pipe Insulation
product.description: The Rockwool mineral wool sections of stone wool insulation are comprised of a layer of factory applied foil which faces a self-adhesive lap. Produced pre-slit, they allow for quick and easy application. The sections provide acoustic and thermal insulation to heating, ventilation and air conditioning pipes that have temperatures in the 0°C to 250°C range.ROCKWOOL Rocklap insulation sections are an ideal solution for a large number of applications in industrial and residential settings alike. The self-adhesive lap allows them to snap onto the pipework to save you time. After that, all you need to do is simply use backing tape to seal the joint fully. 20mm thick and 1m in length, these insulation sections are ideal for pipes that are between 17mm and 60mm in diameter. All in all, they are extremely convenient and versatile.Features & Benefits: Rockwool Rocklap 20mm Wall x 1m Foil Faced Pipe InsulationPre-cut mineral wool insulation sections available in different widths20mm thickness x 1m lengthHigh performing and easy to installCompatible with pipes between 17mm and 60mm in diameter

product.name: Honeywell Home V4073A Motorised Mid Position Diverter Valve
product.description:
The V4073A Valve has been designed to control the flow of water in domestic central heating systems, where both radiator and hot water cylinder circuits are pumped. It is typically suited for small to medium sized installations. The Mid-position Diverter Valve should be used in conjunction with a room thermostat and cylinder thermostat to provide full temperature control of a conventional, fully pumped central heating installation. When used in this way, the control system is known as Sundial Y Plan and the components can be connected together using the Sundial Plan Wiring Centre which has dedicated terminations and there is no need for a wiring diagram.

An alternative method of wiring is to use the Honeywell 10-way Junction Box (42002116-002) together with the Honeywell Sundial Plans Wiring Booklet.Features & Benefits: Honeywell Home V4073A Motorised Mid Position Diverter ValveSpring return actionThree position operationPowerhead replaceable without draining downManual lever for filling/draining downQuiet operation, minimal power consumptionProvides electrical output to boiler and/or pump
product.variant_name: DISCO - Honeywell Home V4073A1088 Motorised Mid Position 28mm Diverter Valve

product.name: Honeywell Home RPZ Backflow Preventer Valve
product.description:
The BA295S backflow preventer protects drinking water systems against back pressure, backflow and back siphonage. They can be used to protect against applications up to and including liquid category 4 in residential, commercial and industrial buildings. Typically, these valves are to be fitted inline to the supplies of commercial washing machines, restaurant kitchens and industrial processes. KIWA approved.
Features & Benefits: Honeywell Home RPZ Backflow Preventer ValveOptimum protection of drinking water supplyTriple security - two check valves and a discharge valveIntegral inlet strainerInlet check valve and discharge valve are combined in one replaceable cartridgeLow pressure loss and high flow rateCompact constructionBA295i variant - stainless steel body

product.name: Honeywell Home Evohome ACH28 & EVA1 Radiator Valve Adaptors
product.description:
This is not the same adaptor that comes with the HR91/92 units.These radiator valve adaptors are designed specifically for use with the highly sophisticated, energy-saving Evohome underfloor heating system by Honeywell. They will improve your systems efficiency, making it easier to operate and helping you save even more money on your energy bills. Features & Benefits: Honeywell Home Evohome ACH28 & EVA1 Radiator Valve AdaptorsHigh performance, energy-saving TRV adaptors  Designed for use with the Evohome system  Grey 3-piece fitting (EVA1)  Black and white fitting (ACH28)  Quick and easy to installThe EVA1 Danfoss is a TRV (thermostatic radiator valve adaptor) which enables a Honeywell HR92 Radiator Controller to fit TRVs with Danfoss TRVs that do not have a M30 x 1.5mm thread for the HR92 to fit on to. The pack includes one Danfoss RA Series Valve Adaptor, one Danfoss RAV Series Valve Adaptor and one Danfoss RAV-L Series Valve Adaptor.The Honeywell Home ACH28 TRV adaptor is a complete replacement valve base plate for the Evohome HR92/HR91 Radiator Controller which allows TRVs with an M28 x 1.5mm thread to fit with the HR92/HR91 Radiator Controllers. Keep in mind that this adaptor is only compatible with certain valves.Product SpecificationHoneywell Controls
EVA1 Danfoss
ACH28 Honeywell
product.variant_name: Discon - ACH28 & EVA1 Radiator Valve Adaptors for Evohome Radiator Valve Adaptor EVA1 Danfoss

product.name: Talon Gas Identification Hinged Pipe Clip
product.description: The Talon Gas Identification Hinged Pipe Clip is a specialized pipe support designed to securely hold and clearly identify gas pipework in both new and existing installations. Manufactured from durable, UV-stabilized polypropylene, these clips are coloured bright yellow to comply with industry standards for gas line identification.These clips are ideal for professional plumbers and DIY enthusiasts aiming for a neat, compliant, and safe gas pipe installation. product.description: The Talon Gas Identification Hinged Pipe Clip is a specialized pipe support designed to securely hold and clearly identify gas pipework in both new and existing installations. product.name: Belimo 3 Port Valve with a 240V Open/Close Actuator
product.description: This Belimo valve and actuator combo is a flexible, reliable solution for automating both hot and cold water systems. The valve operates using signals sent to the top-mounted actuator, allowing a high degree of control. The actuator controls both the valve's opening and closing movement and comes in a range of standard imperial pipe diameters.With a nickel-plated hot-pressed brass valve housing, these valves can be relied on for long-lasting performance throughout the life of your system and can be retrofitted with other actuators in Belimo's extensive range. In addition, in terms of their seal between inlet and outlet, these valves, when closed, have an extremely low leakage rate and are 'air bubble tight' in compliance with EN12266. Finally, all valves are supplied with an auxiliary switch for greater flexibility and resilience against failure.Features & Benefits: Belimo 3 Port Valve with a 240V Open/Close ActuatorValve is opened and closed by the actuatorLong-lasting nickel-plated brass constructionAir bubble tight when closed in compliance with EN12266Comes in a range of common imperial pipe diameters
product.variant_name: Belimo 3 Port Valve 1/2 Inch with a 240V Open/Close Actuator

product.name: Belimo 2 Port Valve with a 240v Actuator and Auxiliary Switch - Powered Open/Spring Return
product.description:
This 2 port valve with actuator and auxiliary switch is an excellent powered-open, spring close valve for open and closed cold and warm water systems. Ideal for modulating water-side control of air handling units and heating systems, the system is designed for use in stationary heating, ventilation and air conditioning systems. This valve is also air-bubble tight for reliable action throughout the service life.With a nickel-plated hot-pressed brass valve housing, these valves can be relied on for long-lasting performance throughout the life of your system and can be retrofitted with other actuators in Belimo's extensive range. In addition, in terms of their seal between inlet and outlet, these valves, when closed, have an extremely low leakage rate and are 'air bubble tight' in compliance with EN12266. Finally, all valves are supplied with an auxiliary switch for greater flexibility and resilience against failure.Features & Benefits: Belimo 2 Port Valve with a 240v Actuator and Auxiliary Switch - Powered Open/Spring ReturnReliable powered open and spring close actionDesigned for use in stationary heating, ventilation and air conditioning systemsIdeal for modulating water-side control2 port valve with actuator and auxiliary switch comboProduct SpecificationBelimo

product.name: Pegler Yorkshire Xpress Copper Press Fit 45 Degree Male/Female Elbow
product.description: Designed to help you fit your pipes together at a 45° angle, this Xpress copper 45° press street elbow is perfect for you! With a quick and easy installation process, this fitting has a totally heat-free jointing system which means no solders, adhesives, or hot works when being applied.Not only will the clean internal bore save you time on cleaning and long preparation, but the copper structures also have no carbon deposits, internal solder, or flux residue - this lessens the risk of your street elbow corroding and increases longevity and durability. This product is ideal for domestic maintenance and refurbishment, as well as new build and large-scale public-sector projects. Features & Benefits: Pegler Yorkshire Xpress Copper Press Fit 45 Degree Male/Female ElbowSafe to install with no naked flame and no localised annealingMaintains electrical continuity when jointed accuratelyThe system does not need to be 'dry' to ensure successful jointingApproved by Kitemark, WRAS, and DVGWWhen your fitting is correctly joined to copper tubing, you can use it for hot and cold water services, vented and unvented closed circuit heating, chilled water, and oil-free compressed air as long as it follows permissible pressure and temperature limits. This product is available in varied sizes from 15mm to 108mm.

product.name: Pegler Yorkshire Xpress Copper S22 Press Partial Crossover
product.description: For fantastic savings in installation time and cost compared to traditional jointing methods, this Xpress copper S22 press part crossover allows a completely heat-free jointing system that doesn't need additional solders, adhesives, compounds, gas, hot works permits or costly insurance. Ideal for diverse applications such as domestic maintenance and refurbishment, new build and large-scale public sector projects, this fitting has a clean internal bore as to prevent extra finishing or cleaning, alongside a lack of carbon deposits, internal solder runs or flux residue to avoid corrosion.Features & Benefits: Pegler Yorkshire Xpress Copper S22 Press Partial CrossoverElectrical continuity assured when the XPress jointing process is completeNo localised annealing from high-temperature workingClean, rapid, heat-free jointingNo complicated clamping techniques, long preparation procedures and waiting for adhesive to drySystem does not need to be 'dry' for effective jointingXPress fittings have a wide range of approvals including Kitemark, WRAS and DVGW
product.variant_name: Pegler Yorkshire Xpress Copper S22 Press Partial Crossover - 15mm
